steam-rom-manager.name: Steam ROM Manager
steam-rom-manager.description: Steam Rom Manager (SRM) is a system that adds games to your Steam library.

cli_commands.description: Run the Steam ROM Manager sync process. Add "purge" to remove all SRM information from Steam

welcome.name: Steam Tools
welcome.description: Synchronize ES-DE Favorites or add RetroDECK to Steam.

tools.name: Install: Steam Controller Templates
tools.description: Installs RetroDECK controller templates to Steam.

steam_tools.name: Automatic Steam Synchronization
steam_tools.description: Enable or disable: Automatically synchronize all marked Favorites from ES-DE to your Steam library.

steam_tools.name: Add RetroDECK to Steam
steam_tools.description: Integrate RetroDECK itself into your Steam library and Steam Input support.

steam_tools.name: Manual Steam Synchronization
steam_tools.description: Manually synchronize all marked Favorites from ES-DE to your Steam library.

steam_tools.name: Remove Synchronized Favorites
steam_tools.description: Completely remove all previously synchronized Favorites from your Steam library.
